research_results.title: All About My eBay
research_results.notes: Personalized hub for tracking all eBay buying, selling, and favorites activities.

research_results.title: Your Watchlist
research_results.notes: Allows users to save up to 1,000 items they're interested in without obligation to purchase.

research_results.title: Saved searches
research_results.notes: Save valuable shopping time by creating saved searches for items users regularly search for.

research_results.title: Optimizing your listings for Best Match
research_results.notes: Default search ranking algorithm designed to show the most relevant listings.

research_results.title: eBay is managing payments
research_results.notes: eBay's payment intermediation platform that processes payments directly.

research_results.title: How immediate payment works
research_results.notes: Feature allowing sellers to require buyers to complete payment before securing an item.

research_results.title: eBay Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2002 Financial Results
research_results.notes: eBay acquired PayPal in 2002 for $1.5 billion, making it the primary payment method on the platform.

research_results.title: Printing and canceling shipping labels
research_results.notes: Prepaid shipping label service offering negotiated rates below retail for USPS, FedEx, and UPS.

research_results.title: Choosing a carrier and service | Seller Center
research_results.notes: Umbrella page for eBay's shipping services including labels, carriers, and shipping options.

research_results.title: eBay: Global Shipping Program
research_results.notes: International shipping service to 100+ countries where eBay handles customs and international logistics.

research_results.title: eIS - eBay International Shipping | eBay.com
research_results.notes: Successor to Global Shipping Program; ships to 200+ countries with eBay managing customs, returns, and tracking.

research_results.title: eBay standard envelope | eBay
research_results.notes: Low-cost shipping for small items under 3oz with integrated tracking and $20-50 protection.

research_results.title: Seller Hub Discounts | Seller Center
research_results.notes: Integrated tool combining markdown and promotion features, launched as part of eBay's Fall 2017 Seller Update.

research_results.title: Seller Hub Reports | eBay
research_results.notes: Now called Seller Hub Reports (migrated June 2021). Legacy bulk management tool using CSV/Excel templates.

research_results.title: Top Rated Seller Program | Seller Center
research_results.notes: Recognition program for sellers delivering exceptional customer service. Announced July 2009.

research_results.title: Adding Best Offer to your listing and sending offers to buyers
research_results.notes: Negotiation feature allowing buyers to make offers on fixed-price listings.

research_results.title: How buying works on eBay
research_results.notes: Fixed-price purchasing option launched November 2000.

research_results.title: Subscriptions and fees | Seller Center
research_results.notes: Subscription storefronts launched June 2001. Five tiers ranging from $4.95-$2,999.95/month.

research_results.title: My Garage | eBay
research_results.notes: Allows users to save vehicle profiles to find compatible parts and accessories.

research_results.title: Parts Compatibility Listings | eBay Motors
research_results.notes: Feature that allows sellers to associate automotive parts with compatible vehicles using Year, Make, and Model data.

research_results.title: eBay Guaranteed Fit
research_results.notes: Guarantees that eligible automotive parts will fit buyer's vehicle or they can return for free.

research_results.title: eBay Guaranteed Fit (Fits Your Vehicle checkmark)
research_results.notes: Green checkmark badge that appears on listings when eBay verifies a part matches the buyer's vehicle.

research_results.title: eBay Money Back Guarantee policy
research_results.notes: Buyer protection covering items not received, not as described, or faulty/damaged.

research_results.title: Buying items with eBay Guaranteed Delivery
research_results.notes: Launched September 2017. Guarantees delivery within 1-4 business days or eBay makes it right.

research_results.title: Intellectual property policy
research_results.notes: Launched 1998 following the Digital Millennium Copyright Act. Allows IP rights owners to report infringing listings.

research_results.title: Resolution Center
research_results.notes: Central dispute resolution hub. Traditional Resolution Center has been largely phased out with functions integrated into Purchase History and Seller Hub.

research_results.title: eBay Security Center - Homepage
research_results.notes: Central trust and safety hub covering account protection, scam prevention, reporting concerns, and security resources.
